rulings.Case Title: DONALD PIPKINS ET AL VS. LARRY D. ODBERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 30, 2017, line 1. DEFENDANT LARRY ODBERT'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED. Plaintiff's untimely opposition is stricken. Plaintiff shall have a 10-day leave to amend to allege causes of action for violation of CC 2924b and 2924f by alleging in good faith ability to tender $210,840.48. Demurer to causes of action for specific performance and breach of contract is sustained without leave to amend. These causes of action were included in the Third Amended Complaint without leave of Court. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JASON PEELLE VS. DEVPAC, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Devpac Llc And Sanford Kingsleys Joinder In Defendant Gaetani Real Estates Motion To Modify Plaintiffs Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 30, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANTS DEVPAC, LLC, SANFORD KINGSLEY'S Joinder In Defendant Gaetani Real Estates Motion To Modify Plaintiffs Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records. Transferred to department 301 to be heard on September 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JASON PEELLE VS. DEVPAC, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Modify Plaintiffs Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 30, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE'S Motion To Modify Plaintiffs Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records. Transferred to department 301 to be heard on September 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers and reply to department 301 no later than August 31, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES CROCKER VS. JOYCE YUTAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To: (1) Compel Defendant'S Responses, Without Objection, To Plaintiff'S Form Interrogtories - Unlawful Detainer, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; (2) Deem Admissions; And (3) Requests For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 30, 2017, line 3. PLAINTIFF CHARLES CROCKER'S Motion To: (1) Compel Defendant's Responses, Without Objection, To Plaintiff's Form Interrogtories - Unlawful Detainer, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; (2) Deem Admissions; And (3) Requests For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide complete responses without objections to From Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount out $750. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AGPM 520 GEARY, LP VS. HAMZA BOUCHAFRA ET AL
